name: ByteWise AI
tagline: Your AI partner for cleaner, more robust freelance code.
description: ByteWise AI empowers freelance developers to deliver professional-grade code with confidence. Leveraging advanced AI, it provides instant, actionable feedback on syntax, best practices, security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and architectural patterns, tailored to project requirements and your unique coding style. It helps solo developers achieve enterprise-level code quality without the overhead.

features.title: Instant AI Code Analysis
features.detail: Upload code snippets or connect to Git repositories for immediate, comprehensive review across multiple dimensions: readability, security, performance, and maintainability.

features.title: Contextual Feedback & Suggestions
features.detail: Receive not just errors, but clear explanations of issues and direct, editable code suggestions for fixes, optimized for various programming languages and frameworks.

features.title: Customizable Review Rules
features.detail: Define project-specific style guides, linting rules, and security policies to tailor AI feedback precisely to client requirements or personal preferences, ensuring consistent quality.

features.title: Performance & Security Deep Dive
features.detail: Proactive identification of potential security vulnerabilities and performance hot-spots within your code, complete with detailed recommendations for hardening and optimization.

features.title: Client-Ready Reports
features.detail: Generate professional, summarized code quality reports to share with clients, demonstrating your commitment to high standards and the efforts invested in delivering pristine code.

audience: Freelance software developers, indie hackers, solo entrepreneurs, and small development agencies focused on delivering high-quality, professional code.
category: Developer Tools, AI Productivity, Code Quality

useCases.title: Pre-Submission Polish
useCases.detail: Run a final AI review before delivering code to a client, ensuring it meets standards, is bug-free, and adheres to best practices, preventing rework and fostering trust.

useCases.title: Skill Enhancement & Learning
useCases.detail: Identify personal coding blind spots, learn new language features, and understand better architectural patterns through personalized feedback and recommended learning resources.

useCases.title: Legacy Code Audit & Refactoring
useCases.detail: Quickly understand the complexity and potential issues in existing or inherited codebases, generating refactoring suggestions to improve maintainability and performance.

engagementLoop.externalTrigger: New client project, approaching deadline, client feature request, desire for external validation.
engagementLoop.internalTrigger: Desire for coding mastery, fear of shipping bugs, pride in delivering clean code, motivation for continuous improvement.
engagementLoop.action: Developer uploads or syncs a code segment/project to ByteWise AI for review, configures custom rules.
engagementLoop.variableReward: Immediate, insightful, and actionable feedback; a clear 'code quality score'; personalized learning insights; 'bug-free streak' achievements; client satisfaction reports; recognition within a community of high-quality developers.
engagementLoop.investment: User spends time reviewing AI suggestions, implementing fixes, providing feedback on AI's accuracy, refining custom rules, building their 'clean code' profile over time.

trendFit: Growth of the Gig Economy & Freelancing
monetization: Freemium Model: Basic code reviews (limited projects/scans, 1 language).
Pro Subscription: Unlimited reviews, multi-language support, Git integration, custom rule sets, client report generation, priority support.
Team/Agency Tier: Collaboration features, centralized billing, advanced analytics and custom branding for reports.
